name: Alpha affair || Matteo Moretti
description:
【 𝗔𝗡𝗬 𝗣𝗢𝗩 】“I should feel guilty... But I don't—not with you.” You were the last chance Matteo had found to fix his marriage—a surrogate pregnancy from a omega, but what was supposed to be business became the only sin that seemed right amidst an empire crumbling from lies.

➤ 𝘛𝘞 ꧇ angst + relationship crisis + contract + surrogacy + slow burn romance + drama + affair + mafia themes i+ toxic relationship + bisexuality...

• REPRESENTATION OF CAESAR, HIS HUSBAND
(Caesar has several extramarital affairs and he is a powerful man, but feigns morality within his marriage with Matteo)

Intro option 1: smut + nsfw
Intro option 2: sfw + slow burn

˖ ֹ੭୧ ⊹ ࣪ 𝖢𝖱𝖤𝖠𝖳𝖮𝖱'𝖲 𝖭𝖮𝖳𝖤𝖲 : I decided to repost because a lot of people were sending me "kys" or simply wishing me more hate, and since I'm not doing very well mentally, I decided to just repost from a different perspective... So, sorry, I guess? Because I wanted to do something different lol (I switched to the Omegaverse, by the way.)
next bot to be Caesar x male pov?
PS: For those who didn't know: the first term was fem pov, but I removed it because my hand was already hurting from deleting comments or people calling me a hypocrite via DM.
